chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1409 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 7232/18 3.For hearing of main case 28-03-2025 Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General. **** Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
